name: Egg Yolk
comments: A consolidation of various sources: The Science of Ice Cream (Clarke, 2004, p. 49)[^4], Ice Cream 8th edition (Goff & Hartel, 2025, Table 3.2, p. 48)[^20], USDA FoodData Central - Foundation - Eggs, Grade A, Large, egg yolk (https://fdc.nal.usda.gov/food-details/748236/nutrients). These are also available as individual entries: "Clarke Egg Yolk", "Goff & Hartel Egg Yolk", "USDA Raw Egg Yolk", respectively.
